title: Premier Housewares 1901048 Picnic Basket Bread Basket Wicker Basket Oval Hamper Baskets For Gifts Lining Woven Basket Red H14x W27x D19
features: • Our multi purpose storage basket will help provide a clutter free home
• Featuring double handles with a removable and machine washable lining
• A charming and practical way to store and organise your belongings
• Care instructions: Wipe clean with a soft cloth. Do not use abrasive cleaners
• Height 14 cm x Width 27 cm x Depth 19 cm
description: From the manufacturer Premier Housewares Willow Bread Basket The multi-purpose willow basket, with its stylish red Gingham lining, will make a charming solution for storing your bits and bobs or food, helping to keep a tidy home. The dark willow weave design is not only decorative to look at, but gives the basket its strength and durability. The dual handles are securely attached allowing you to carry the basket with ease. Giving the basket a more appealing style is the red Gingham lining that is machine washable allowing you to display the basket with pride. A chic heart design hangs of the handle, adding to its already eye-catching look. So whether you want to keep your essentials close to hand or display and transport food, the versatility of the charming willow basket will give the style and practicality you require. Features Charming design. Durable. Storage solution. Machine washable linen. Handles.
